rubric.goal: Mark SEC-C and SEC-D as not production-ready with correct blocker references, impact classes, and overall production_ready false.
Identify the clinical-risk responsive miscoding defect in SEC-C and select recode-and-produce remediation.
Identify the incomplete privilege log and calculate 475 unlogged documents from 840 withheld and 365 logged.
Identify the five legal-advice emails forwarded to a trial consultant as third-party waiver with waiver assessment action.
Identify the privilege cleanup package for over-designated counsel-copy emails and privileged documents miscoded nonprivileged.
Report the required readiness metrics for privilege, waiver, miscoding, personal-source gaps, non-ready categories, and final readiness.
Provide the prioritized action set and rank order for recoding, privilege-log supplementation, waiver assessment, and QC remediation.
